title: 2300 Building A Mechanical Oscillator
description:
If you want to build this you will need to get the rubber band escapement from video 2299
The STL files are on thingiverse and can be found here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6789612
for the mechanical oscillator  and here https://www.thingiverse.com/thing:6787270
for the escapement mechanism

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC4AkVj-qnJxNtKuz3rkq16A/join

Don't forget to check out my companion channels TnT Omnibus here https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC1E8OmOG17VckoPviOPmkMw  and TnT Talk Time found here https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCVaUhDJTviZ17K8vXnR1HjQ
